expo.name: Centurio
expo.description: Smart budget tracker with voice input, receipt scanning, and AI-powered expense tracking. Manage your finances effortlessly.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Centurio uses your microphone to record voice memos so you can log expenses hands-free.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Centurio uses your camera to scan receipts and automatically log your expenses.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Centurio accesses your photo library so you can choose a receipt image to scan.

plugins.photosPermission: Centurio accesses your photo library so you can choose a receipt image to scan.
plugins.cameraPermission: Centurio uses your camera to scan receipts and automatically log your expenses.
